name: Ria Money Transfer Agent
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance provider enabling customers to send and receive money across 190+ countries through multiple channels with 600,000+ payout locations.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has operated for over 35 years as an established international money transfer service. The company specializes in remittances, allowing customers to send funds to family and friends worldwide with a focus on speed, security, and accessibility across diverse markets including Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, and Oceania. Their primary service model centers on facilitating cross-border money movement rather than traditional financial products like loans or credit services.

Ria offers multiple sending channels including online transfers via their website, mobile app, in-person cash payments at physical locations, and WhatsApp-based transfers. Customers can receive money through bank deposits, cash pickup at 600,000+ partner locations, digital wallets, home delivery, and ATM withdrawals. The platform supports over 100 currencies and claims to have processed over one billion transfers. Their rates are competitively positioned, with promotional offers (such as 1.99 USD fee on Mexico transfers) and a currency converter tool for transparency.

The company differentiates itself through its extensive agent network, institutional partnerships (including sponsorship of the Mexican National Team), and multi-platform accessibility. They offer 4.9-star ratings on iOS, 4.8 stars on Google Play, and 4.5 stars on Trustpilot based on 249,800+ to 234,600+ reviews. Their 100% satisfaction guarantee and emphasis on security from established operations distinguish them in the remittance space.

Ria's positioning as a check-cashing category company reflects that money transfers are a form of alternative financial service alongside traditional banking. However, the company's primary function is remittance transfer rather than check cashing per se. For consumers sending international remittances, Ria provides a legitimate, long-established alternative to banks. The main consideration is that like all money transfer services, competitive rates and fees vary by destination country and transfer method.
address: Quick Corner, 66 S Mesa Dr #2, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: Quick Corner, 66 S Mesa Dr #2, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: 600,000+ cash pickup locations across 190+ countries providing extensive payout accessibility
Multiple sending options including online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp transfers for user convenience
Support for 100+ currencies with transparent rate conversion tools and currency calculator
35+ years of operational history with over one billion transfers processed, indicating scale and reliability
Competitive fees with promotional rates (e.g., $1.99 on first Mexico transfers) and zero transfer fees to certain destinations
High customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 stars iOS, 4.5 stars Trustpilot) with 234,600+ user reviews
100% satisfaction guarantee and real-time transfer tracking functionality
cons: Exchange rates and fees vary significantly by destination country and transfer method, requiring price comparison
Website does not prominently display standard fee schedules or rate cards, requiring users to enter transaction details to see costs
Limited transparency on processing times across different destinations and delivery methods at initial discovery stage
Cash pickup method dependent on partner agent network availability, which may be limited in some remote areas despite large location count
Regulatory and compliance requirements for international transfers may create delays or additional verification steps not immediately visible
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending regular remittances to family in developing markets with limited banking infrastructure
International travelers and business professionals needing fast, multi-currency money transfers across borders
Consumers in countries with 600,000+ Ria partner locations seeking convenient cash pickup alternatives to bank transfers
Users preferring mobile-first or social media (WhatsApp) transfer methods over traditional wire services
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for immigrants, expatriates, and international remittance senders seeking fast, accessible cross-border money movement to 190+ countries. The primary caveat is that rates, fees, and delivery speed vary substantially by destination country and transfer method, requiring users to compare quotes for specific transaction pairs before committing.
services: Online money transfer via website with real-time rate quotes
Mobile app-based money transfers with repeat transfer shortcuts
In-person cash payment at physical agent locations
WhatsApp-based money transfer to select countries
Bank deposit delivery for receiving funds internationally
Cash pickup at 600,000+ partner locations globally
Home delivery for received money transfers
ATM withdrawal functionality for transferred funds
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
Currency converter tool for rate transparency
IBAN calculator for bank transfer verification
